questions_detail.question: When Jon is planning to open his dance studio?

memories.memory:
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Hey Jon! Good to see you. What's up? Anything new?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Hey Gina! Good to see you too. Lost my job as a banker yesterday, so I'm gonna take a shot at starting my own business.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Sorry about your job Jon, but starting your own business sounds awesome! Unfortunately, I also lost my job at Door Dash this month. What business are you thinking of?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Sorry to hear that! I'm starting a dance studio 'cause I'm passionate about dancing and it'd be great to share it with others.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: That's cool, Jon! What got you into this biz?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: I've been into dancing since I was a kid and it's been my passion and escape. I wanna start a dance studio so I can teach others the joy that dancing brings me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow Jon, same here! Dance is pretty much my go-to for stress relief. Got any fave styles?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Cool, Gina! I love all dances, but contemporary is my top pick. It's so expressive and powerful! What's your fave?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Yeah, me too! Contemporary dance is so expressive and graceful - it really speaks to me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, great idea! Let's go to a dance class, it'll be so much fun!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Yeah! Let's explore some new dance moves. We should plan a dance session soon!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah definitely! Wanna see my moves next Fri? Can't wait!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Sounds great, Jon! Next Friday works. Let's boogie!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, I'm excited too! This is gonna be great!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a man in a suit is performing a dance]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow! What did you get?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Woah, that pic's from when my dance crew took home first in a local comp last year. It was amazing up on that stage! I'm super keen to spread that intensity with other peeps. Gina, you ever been in any dance comps or shows?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: I used to compete in a few dance competitions and shows - my fav memory was when my team won first place at a regionals at age fifteen. It was an awesome feeling of accomplishment!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photography of a couple of people standing next to each other]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow! Winning first place is amazing! What dance were you doing?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Thanks! We just did a contemporary piece called "Finding Freedom." It was really emotional and powerful.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a large open porch with a fireplace and a view of the water]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, that must've been great! Check my ideal dance studio by the water.
  [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a room with a view of the ocean and a few yoga mats]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Cool setup! Man, you can't deny that view! Got time to rehearse with a biz and a new store?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Hopefully, we will find a place like this that will inspire us!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, it looks great! What dances do you practice? Got any projects planned?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Thanks! I rehearsed with a small group of dancers after work. We do all kinds of dances, from contemporary to hip-hop. We've got some cool projects in the works. Finishing up choreography to perform at a nearby festival next month. Can't wait!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a group of dancers in white dresses on a stage]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, it looks awesome! Are they yours at the festival? They're so graceful!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah, they're the ones performing at the festival! They've been practicing hard and will definitely impress with their grace and skill.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, they look great! Can't wait to see them rock the festival. Gonna be awesome!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah, awesome! Glad to be part of it.

[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Hey Gina! I'm turning my loves of dance into a business. I'm sunk tons of time into the studio lately, and look at my students - they're already killing it. I'm even learning with them!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a group of dancers on a stage with a red background]
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Hey Jon! Wow, way to take your passion and make it into a biz! The dance studio looks awesome.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a display of a dress and a flamingo]
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Thanks, Gina! I'm determined to make this studio work. Losing my job was tough but it gave me the push I needed to do what I love.
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Woah, Jon! Tough times can be a gateway to awesome things. Glad you worked up the courage to go after your dreams!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a red dress with gold accents on a mannequin]
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Yeah, Gina! It's been tough, but I'm living my true self. Dancing makes me so happy, and now I get to share that with other people. Seeing my students get better at it brings me such joy.
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a woman doing a pole dance in a dance studio]
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Wow Jon, you look so happy when you dance! Show the world your true self and keep dancing!
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Thanks a bunch, Gina! You seriously rock. Dancing for me is like a way to express myself and find my happy place. I used to be scared to death of what people would think, but I learnt that my own happiness is the most important thing. It's been tough but also the best thing ever!
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Yeah, I do remember those dance classes! I used to love spending time in the studio. That photo looks awesome, brings back lots of memories. It's nice to know, dance is still your happy place.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a group of young women in ballet attire]
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Nice, Gina! I'm happy that dance has such a special meaning to both of us. It's a really cool way to express ourselves. I loved taking lessons with my friends when I was younger. Those memories are so precious. So glad I can still enjoy it with my own studio. Thanks for always being there for me.
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Hey Jon! Got your back - dance is awesome for expressing yourself and finding happiness. Here's one of my trophies from a dance contest, nice reminder of the hard work, dedication and joy it brings.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a trophy with a glass globe on top]
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Wow! It looks awesome! Thanks for the support, it really means a lot.
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: No prob, Jon! You earned all the kudos for your hard work. Keep it up!
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Thanks! Gonna keep pushing and working hard. Won't let anything hold me back!
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Way to go, Jon! Keep it up, you're almost there!

[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Jon: Hey Gina, hope you're doing great! Still working on my biz. Took a short trip last week to Rome to clear my mind a little.
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Gina: Hi! Good for you! It definitely will help you to concentrate on your biz better.

  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a group of young dancers in a dance studio]
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Gina: Congrats, Jon! The studio looks amazing. You've put a lot of work into this and I'm so pumped for the launch tomorrow. Don't miss a beat!
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Jon: Thanks, Gina! I'm excited! It's been a wild ride, but I'm feeling good and ready to give it my best.
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Gina: Wow, Jon, you must be so excited! You've come so far since we last talked, and tomorrow's gonna be a blast! All those long nights were worth it - so take some time to savor it. Capture the joy and thrill that dance brings - it's magical!
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Jon: Tomorrow's gonna be an awesome night and I'm not gonna forget a second of it. I put so much into this and I want to savor all the good vibes. Thanks for always having my back. You're the best!
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Gina: I'm always proud of you. Enjoy the good feels tomorrow, you earned it!
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Jon: Thanks! Your pride and support mean a lot. Looking forward to enjoying the moment with you.
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Gina: I'll be right by your side, Jon. Let's live it up and make some great memories tomorrow. So excited!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a group of people in a dance studio]
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Jon: Yeah! Let's make some awesome memories tomorrow at the grand opening!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a man in a native costume is giving another man a high five]
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Gina: Can't wait to make more memories at your dance studio!
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Jon: Looking forward to more cool memories!
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Gina: I love being around friends and having such a great time. Can't wait to have fun at your dance studio!
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Jon: Agreed!
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Gina: Can't wait for tomorrow's grand opening!
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Jon: Woohoo! Tomorrow's opening will be so much fun. Can't wait for it - and for you to be there!
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Gina: Can't wait too!
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Jon: Definitely! Let's make tomorrow unforgettable, Gina. See you there! Bye!
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Gina: See you tomorrow. Bye!

[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Hi! Since we last spoke I am still working on the dance studio and things are looking up!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a woman in a short skirt with her hands on her hips]
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: Hi! You're so inspiring taking it on and opening your own studio!
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Thanks! Losing my job gave me the push to finally start my dream business: my own dance studio! Now I'm stepping into the unknown and hoping for the best.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: It must be scary stepping into the unknown but I know you can do it, Jon. With your determination and drive, your dance studio will be a huge success. Keep that positive outlook and keep going!
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Thanks! It's a bit scary, but I just think about my love for dance and how it makes me feel. It's been my stress-buster since childhood!
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: Gotcha, Jon! Dance is my stress fix too. As soon as I start, all my worries vanish. It's amazing what we can do for our own mental health with something we enjoy.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Yeah, Gina! Dancing helps me de-stress. It's where I'm most alive. It's a must-have in my life.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: I get it, Jon. Dance is just me -- I can't picture life without it. It's like air.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Yep! Dancing is like second nature to me. I'm living my dream by having my own dance studio and teaching others.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: You're living the dream and inspiring others too! Your studio will totally change things for lots of folks.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: I hope so, Gina. I want to create a place for people to dance and express themselves - it's been a dream of mine.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: That's a great dream, Jon! Giving people a place to express themselves with dance is really important. Your studio is gonna make a huge difference. Can't wait to see it happen!
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Thanks! Your help means a lot. Keep you posted on the dance studio progress.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: Thanks! Really appreciate you keeping me in the loop on this cool project. Can't wait to hear more and watch it come to life! Oh, btw, I had an interview for a design internship yesterday! It was so cool.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Wow, Gina, I'm stoked about this! Taking a risk is scary, but I'm sure following my dreams will pay off in the end. How did the interview go?
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: It was great!
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Glad to hear it. Been practicing dance routines lately, it keeps my mind focused and motivated.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: Wow! That's great. Dancing is awesome for staying focused. Wanna show me a routine sometime?
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Sure, Gina! Wanna see one of my routines? Lemme know when you got time and I'll send you a vid.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: Yeah, Jon, I'll watch your routine! So proud of you!
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Thanks a lot! Your help really means a lot. I'll get the video to you soon!
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: No prob! Always here to help. Can't wait to see the vid!

[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Jon: Hey Gina! We haven't talked in a few days. Been rehearsing hard and working on business plans. It's been stressful, but dancing has kept me going.
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Gina: Hey Jon! Remember, just do it! You should get to the point where anyone else would quit and you're not going to stop there. No, what are you waiting for? Do it! Just do it!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a group of dancers on a stage with their arms in the air]
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Jon: Ha, ha! Thanks, Gina. Sounds familiar, who do those words belong to?
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Gina: It's Shia Labeouf!
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Jon: Ahhahha, really!? Yea, that definitely him.
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Gina: Hah, yeah!) But really having a creative space for dancers is so important. Last Friday at dance class with a group of friends I felt it. Your studio will be a go-to spot for self-expression. Keep up the good work and don't forget your passion for dance.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of three girls in ballet costumes sitting on a desk]
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Jon: Thanks, Gina! Your words of encouragement keep me motivated. Can't wait 'til my studio starts welcoming dancers of all ages and backgrounds!
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Gina: I'm so happy to see my words motivating you, Jon. <3
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Jon: Thanks a ton, Gina! Your help and encouragement mean a lot. Your support will help me make it happen.
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Gina: You're welcome, Jon! I'm here to support you. Every step's getting you closer to your dream. Never give up! You're doing great.
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Jon: Thanks, Gina! I won't quit. I'm gonna keep going, whatever comes my way.
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Gina: Remember Jon, Just do it!
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Jon: Ah ha ha, yeah, JUST DOING IT!
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Gina: That's the spirit! Bye!

[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Jon: Hey Gina, hope you're doing ok! Still following my passion for dance. It's been bumpy, but I'm determined to make it work. I'm still searching for a place to open my dance studio.

  [Image shared by Gina: a photography of a clothing store with a lot of clothes on display]
[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Jon: Wow, it looks great! Must've taken you ages to design it. What made you pick out the furniture and decor?

[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Gina: Thanks. Your support means a lot. I'm sure with my hard work and effort, I can make a special shopping experience for my customers. It's tough but I'm up for the challenge!
[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Jon: I'm always here to support you! Go create something awesome with your store. Keep it up!
[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Gina: Thanks, Jon! I'll try my best. You're gonna do great with your dance studio, just keep going and stay positive! We'll get through this!
[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Jon: Thanks! Your words mean a lot. I'm staying positive and pushing forward. We've put our hearts into our dreams and I'm sure we'll make it.
[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Gina: Sure thing, Jon! Stay motivated and keep going. Hard work pays off eventually. We can do this!

[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Gina: Hey Jon! Long time no see! Things have been hectic lately. I just launched an ad campaign for my clothing store in hopes of growing the business. Starting my own store and taking risks is both scary and rewarding. I'm excited to see where it takes me!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a clothing store with a variety of clothes on display]
[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Jon: Hey Gina! Whoa, your store looks great! All your hard work really paid off - congrats! Must be awesome to see your stuff on display.
[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Gina: Thanks a bunch! It's awesome seeing my vision happen. How's the dance studio going? Did you find the right spot?
[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Jon: Hey Gina! Thanks for asking. I'm on the hunt for the ideal spot for my dance studio and it's been quite a journey! I've been looking at different places and picturing how the space would look. I even found a place with great natural light! Oh, I've been to Paris yesterday! It was sooo cool.
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a bathroom with a blue floor and a pink wall]
[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Gina: Wow, nice spot! Where is it? Got any other features you want to think about before you decide? Paris?! That is really great Jon! Never had a chance to visit it. Been only to Rome once.
[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Jon: It's downtown which is awesome cuz it's easy to get to. Plus the natural light! Gotta check the size & floor quality too. We need a good dance floor with enough bounce for me & my students to dance safely.
[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Gina: Definitely! Dance floors help avoid injuries and make dancing more enjoyable. You thinking about it is great. Any particular type of flooring you like?
[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Jon: Yeah, good flooring's crucial. I'm after Marley flooring, which is what dance studios usually use. It's great 'cause it's grippy but still lets you move, plus it's tough and easy to keep clean.
[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Gina: Sounds great! Marley's perfect; it's got the right amount of grip and movement. Can't wait to see your dance studio done!
[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Jon: Yeah, can't wait to see it done! Looking for the right place and getting everything ready has been a mix of exciting and nerve-wracking, but I'm determined to make it work. It'll be worth it!
[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Gina: Believe in yourself, Jon! The process may be tough, but you got this. Push through and it'll be worth it. Don't forget to take breaks and dance it out when you need to destress!
[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Jon: Glad I have you in my corner! Gotta make time to dance and vent, that's for sure. We'll make it through this - hang in there!
[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Gina: Thanks, Jon! Appreciate your support!
[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Jon: Let's keep going and chase our dreams!
[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Gina: Yeah! We've done so much, and there's nothing but good stuff coming. Let's keep going after our goals and making them happen.
[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Jon: Success is almost here. We got this!

questions_detail.question: How long did it take for Jon to open his studio?
questions_detail.generated_answer: About five months, January to June.

[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Hi! Since we last spoke I am still working on the dance studio and things are looking up!

[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Jon: I'm always here to support you! Go create something awesome with your store. Keep it up!

[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Gina: Hey Jon! Long time no see! Things have been hectic lately. I just launched an ad campaign for my clothing store in hopes of growing the business. Starting my own store and taking risks is both scary and rewarding. I'm excited to see where it takes me!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a clothing store with a variety of clothes on display]
[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Jon: Hey Gina! Whoa, your store looks great! All your hard work really paid off - congrats! Must be awesome to see your stuff on display.
[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Gina: Thanks a bunch! It's awesome seeing my vision happen. How's the dance studio going? Did you find the right spot?

I've been looking at different places and picturing how the space would look. I even found a place with great natural light! Oh, I've been to Paris yesterday! It was sooo cool.

[January 29, 2023, 02:32 PM] Jon: Yeah, can't wait to see it done! Looking for the right place and getting everything ready has been a mix of exciting and nerve-wracking, but I'm determined to make it work. It'll be worth it!

questions_detail.question: When did Jon and Gina decide to collaborate to create dance content?

memories.memory:
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Hey Jon! Good to see you. What's up? Anything new?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Hey Gina! Good to see you too. Lost my job as a banker yesterday, so I'm gonna take a shot at starting my own business.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Sorry about your job Jon, but starting your own business sounds awesome! Unfortunately, I also lost my job at Door Dash this month. What business are you thinking of?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Sorry to hear that! I'm starting a dance studio 'cause I'm passionate about dancing and it'd be great to share it with others.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: That's cool, Jon! What got you into this biz?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: I've been into dancing since I was a kid and it's been my passion and escape. I wanna start a dance studio so I can teach others the joy that dancing brings me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow Jon, same here! Dance is pretty much my go-to for stress relief. Got any fave styles?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Cool, Gina! I love all dances, but contemporary is my top pick. It's so expressive and powerful! What's your fave?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Yeah, me too! Contemporary dance is so expressive and graceful - it really speaks to me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, great idea! Let's go to a dance class, it'll be so much fun!

[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Hey Jon! Good to see you. What's up? Anything new?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Hey Gina! Good to see you too. Lost my job as a banker yesterday, so I'm gonna take a shot at starting my own business.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Sorry about your job Jon, but starting your own business sounds awesome! Unfortunately, I also lost my job at Door Dash this month. What business are you thinking of?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Sorry to hear that! I'm starting a dance studio 'cause I'm passionate about dancing and it'd be great to share it with others.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: That's cool, Jon! What got you into this biz?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: I've been into dancing since I was a kid and it's been my passion and escape. I wanna start a dance studio so I can teach others the joy that dancing brings me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow Jon, same here! Dance is pretty much my go-to for stress relief. Got any fave styles?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Cool, Gina! I love all dances, but contemporary is my top pick. It's so expressive and powerful! What's your fave?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Yeah, me too! Contemporary dance is so expressive and graceful - it really speaks to me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, great idea! Let's go to a dance class, it'll be so much fun!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Yeah! Let's explore some new dance moves. We should plan a dance session soon!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah definitely! Wanna see my moves next Fri? Can't wait!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Sounds great, Jon! Next Friday works. Let's boogie!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, I'm excited too! This is gonna be great!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a man in a suit is performing a dance]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow! What did you get?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Woah, that pic's from when my dance crew took home first in a local comp last year. It was amazing up on that stage! I'm super keen to spread that intensity with other peeps. Gina, you ever been in any dance comps or shows?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: I used to compete in a few dance competitions and shows - my fav memory was when my team won first place at a regionals at age fifteen. It was an awesome feeling of accomplishment!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photography of a couple of people standing next to each other]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow! Winning first place is amazing! What dance were you doing?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Thanks! We just did a contemporary piece called "Finding Freedom." It was really emotional and powerful.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a large open porch with a fireplace and a view of the water]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, that must've been great! Check my ideal dance studio by the water.
  [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a room with a view of the ocean and a few yoga mats]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Cool setup! Man, you can't deny that view! Got time to rehearse with a biz and a new store?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Hopefully, we will find a place like this that will inspire us!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, it looks great! What dances do you practice? Got any projects planned?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Thanks! I rehearsed with a small group of dancers after work. We do all kinds of dances, from contemporary to hip-hop. We've got some cool projects in the works. Finishing up choreography to perform at a nearby festival next month. Can't wait!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a group of dancers in white dresses on a stage]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, it looks awesome! Are they yours at the festival? They're so graceful!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah, they're the ones performing at the festival! They've been practicing hard and will definitely impress with their grace and skill.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, they look great! Can't wait to see them rock the festival. Gonna be awesome!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah, awesome! Glad to be part of it.

[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Hey Gina! I'm turning my loves of dance into a business. I'm sunk tons of time into the studio lately, and look at my students - they're already killing it. I'm even learning with them!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a group of dancers on a stage with a red background]
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Hey Jon! Wow, way to take your passion and make it into a biz! The dance studio looks awesome.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a display of a dress and a flamingo]
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Thanks, Gina! I'm determined to make this studio work. Losing my job was tough but it gave me the push I needed to do what I love.
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Woah, Jon! Tough times can be a gateway to awesome things. Glad you worked up the courage to go after your dreams!

I used to be scared to death of what people would think, but I learnt that my own happiness is the most important thing. It's been tough but also the best thing ever!

I loved taking lessons with my friends when I was younger. Those memories are so precious. So glad I can still enjoy it with my own studio. Thanks for always being there for me.

[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Wow! It looks awesome! Thanks for the support, it really means a lot.

[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Way to go, Jon! Keep it up, you're almost there!

[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Gina: Hah, yeah!) But really having a creative space for dancers is so important. Last Friday at dance class with a group of friends I felt it. Your studio will be a go-to spot for self-expression. Keep up the good work and don't forget your passion for dance.

[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Gina: I'm so happy to see my words motivating you, Jon. <3
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Jon: Thanks a ton, Gina! Your help and encouragement mean a lot. Your support will help me make it happen.
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Gina: You're welcome, Jon! I'm here to support you. Every step's getting you closer to your dream. Never give up! You're doing great.
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Jon: Thanks, Gina! I won't quit. I'm gonna keep going, whatever comes my way.
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Gina: Remember Jon, Just do it!
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Jon: Ah ha ha, yeah, JUST DOING IT!
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Gina: That's the spirit! Bye!

[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Jon: Agreed!
[June 19, 2023, 10:04 AM] Gina: Can't wait for tomorrow's grand opening!

[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Hey Jon! Good to see you. What's up? Anything new?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Hey Gina! Good to see you too. Lost my job as a banker yesterday, so I'm gonna take a shot at starting my own business.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Sorry about your job Jon, but starting your own business sounds awesome! Unfortunately, I also lost my job at Door Dash this month. What business are you thinking of?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Sorry to hear that! I'm starting a dance studio 'cause I'm passionate about dancing and it'd be great to share it with others.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: That's cool, Jon! What got you into this biz?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: I've been into dancing since I was a kid and it's been my passion and escape. I wanna start a dance studio so I can teach others the joy that dancing brings me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow Jon, same here! Dance is pretty much my go-to for stress relief. Got any fave styles?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Cool, Gina! I love all dances, but contemporary is my top pick. It's so expressive and powerful! What's your fave?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Yeah, me too! Contemporary dance is so expressive and graceful - it really speaks to me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, great idea! Let's go to a dance class, it'll be so much fun!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Yeah! Let's explore some new dance moves. We should plan a dance session soon!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah definitely! Wanna see my moves next Fri? Can't wait!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Sounds great, Jon! Next Friday works. Let's boogie!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, I'm excited too! This is gonna be great!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a man in a suit is performing a dance]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow! What did you get?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Woah, that pic's from when my dance crew took home first in a local comp last year. It was amazing up on that stage! I'm super keen to spread that intensity with other peeps. Gina, you ever been in any dance comps or shows?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: I used to compete in a few dance competitions and shows - my fav memory was when my team won first place at a regionals at age fifteen. It was an awesome feeling of accomplishment!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photography of a couple of people standing next to each other]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow! Winning first place is amazing! What dance were you doing?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Thanks! We just did a contemporary piece called "Finding Freedom." It was really emotional and powerful.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a large open porch with a fireplace and a view of the water]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, that must've been great! Check my ideal dance studio by the water.
  [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a room with a view of the ocean and a few yoga mats]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Cool setup! Man, you can't deny that view! Got time to rehearse with a biz and a new store?

[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, it looks great! What dances do you practice? Got any projects planned?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Thanks! I rehearsed with a small group of dancers after work. We do all kinds of dances, from contemporary to hip-hop. We've got some cool projects in the works. Finishing up choreography to perform at a nearby festival next month. Can't wait!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a group of dancers in white dresses on a stage]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, it looks awesome! Are they yours at the festival? They're so graceful!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah, they're the ones performing at the festival! They've been practicing hard and will definitely impress with their grace and skill.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, they look great! Can't wait to see them rock the festival. Gonna be awesome!

questions_detail.question: What is Jon's favorite style of dance?
questions_detail.generated_answer: His favorite dance style is contemporary.

memories.memory:
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Hey Jon! Good to see you. What's up? Anything new?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Hey Gina! Good to see you too. Lost my job as a banker yesterday, so I'm gonna take a shot at starting my own business.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Sorry about your job Jon, but starting your own business sounds awesome! Unfortunately, I also lost my job at Door Dash this month. What business are you thinking of?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Sorry to hear that! I'm starting a dance studio 'cause I'm passionate about dancing and it'd be great to share it with others.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: That's cool, Jon! What got you into this biz?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: I've been into dancing since I was a kid and it's been my passion and escape. I wanna start a dance studio so I can teach others the joy that dancing brings me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow Jon, same here! Dance is pretty much my go-to for stress relief. Got any fave styles?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Cool, Gina! I love all dances, but contemporary is my top pick. It's so expressive and powerful! What's your fave?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Yeah, me too! Contemporary dance is so expressive and graceful - it really speaks to me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, great idea! Let's go to a dance class, it'll be so much fun!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Yeah! Let's explore some new dance moves. We should plan a dance session soon!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah definitely! Wanna see my moves next Fri? Can't wait!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Sounds great, Jon! Next Friday works. Let's boogie!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, I'm excited too! This is gonna be great!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a man in a suit is performing a dance]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow! What did you get?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Woah, that pic's from when my dance crew took home first in a local comp last year. It was amazing up on that stage! I'm super keen to spread that intensity with other peeps. Gina, you ever been in any dance comps or shows?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: I used to compete in a few dance competitions and shows - my fav memory was when my team won first place at a regionals at age fifteen. It was an awesome feeling of accomplishment!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photography of a couple of people standing next to each other]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow! Winning first place is amazing! What dance were you doing?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Thanks! We just did a contemporary piece called "Finding Freedom." It was really emotional and powerful.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a large open porch with a fireplace and a view of the water]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, that must've been great! Check my ideal dance studio by the water.
  [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a room with a view of the ocean and a few yoga mats]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Cool setup! Man, you can't deny that view! Got time to rehearse with a biz and a new store?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Hopefully, we will find a place like this that will inspire us!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, it looks great! What dances do you practice? Got any projects planned?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Thanks! I rehearsed with a small group of dancers after work. We do all kinds of dances, from contemporary to hip-hop. We've got some cool projects in the works. Finishing up choreography to perform at a nearby festival next month. Can't wait!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a group of dancers in white dresses on a stage]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, it looks awesome! Are they yours at the festival? They're so graceful!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah, they're the ones performing at the festival! They've been practicing hard and will definitely impress with their grace and skill.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, they look great! Can't wait to see them rock the festival. Gonna be awesome!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah, awesome! Glad to be part of it.

[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Hey Gina! I'm turning my loves of dance into a business. I'm sunk tons of time into the studio lately, and look at my students - they're already killing it. I'm even learning with them!

I loved taking lessons with my friends when I was younger. Those memories are so precious. So glad I can still enjoy it with my own studio. Thanks for always being there for me.

[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Way to go, Jon! Keep it up, you're almost there!

[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: You're living the dream and inspiring others too! Your studio will totally change things for lots of folks.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: I hope so, Gina. I want to create a place for people to dance and express themselves - it's been a dream of mine.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: That's a great dream, Jon! Giving people a place to express themselves with dance is really important. Your studio is gonna make a huge difference. Can't wait to see it happen!
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Thanks! Your help means a lot. Keep you posted on the dance studio progress.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: Thanks! Really appreciate you keeping me in the loop on this cool project. Can't wait to hear more and watch it come to life! Oh, btw, I had an interview for a design internship yesterday! It was so cool.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Wow, Gina, I'm stoked about this! Taking a risk is scary, but I'm sure following my dreams will pay off in the end. How did the interview go?

[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Glad to hear it. Been practicing dance routines lately, it keeps my mind focused and motivated.

[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Jon: Hey Gina! We haven't talked in a few days. Been rehearsing hard and working on business plans. It's been stressful, but dancing has kept me going.

questions_detail.question: What was Gina's favorite dancing memory?
questions_detail.gold_answer: Winning first place at a regionals dance competition

[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Hey Gina! I'm turning my loves of dance into a business. I'm sunk tons of time into the studio lately, and look at my students - they're already killing it. I'm even learning with them!

  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a display of a dress and a flamingo]

I used to be scared to death of what people would think, but I learnt that my own happiness is the most important thing. It's been tough but also the best thing ever!
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Yeah, I do remember those dance classes! I used to love spending time in the studio. That photo looks awesome, brings back lots of memories. It's nice to know, dance is still your happy place.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a group of young women in ballet attire]

[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Wow! It looks awesome! Thanks for the support, it really means a lot.

[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Way to go, Jon! Keep it up, you're almost there!

[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Jon: Gina, you won't believe it - I got mentored by this amazing business dude yesterday! It was really inspiring and now I'm even more pumped to chase my dreams. What's been up with you lately?

[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Jon: Thanks! I won't quit, no matter what. Your encouragement really motivates me to keep going.
[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Gina: Way to go, Jon! Don't quit, remember, failures lead you closer to success. Here's a pic from when I was dancing - it was a tough road, but it was worth it!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a group of young women posing for a picture]
[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Jon: Wow, that's an awesome pic! You guys look great and passionate about dancing. Reminds me how much I love performing. Thanks for sharing!
[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Gina: Thanks! I'm glad the pic reminded you of your love for dancing. Keep going after your dreams!
[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Jon: Sure thing, Gina! Your help means a lot to me. I'm not giving up.
[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Gina: Go, Jon! I'm here for you. Keep going!
[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Jon: Knowing you've got my back really helps keep me going. I won't let you down!
[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Gina: No worries, Jon! You're really inspiring with your determination and passion for dance. Keep it up!

  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a group of people in a dance class]

  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a clipboard with a notepad attached to it]

  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a notebook with a calendar on it]
[June 13, 2023, 08:29 PM] Gina: Really cool system! Being organized sure is key for getting stuff done. How do you keep up with your goals and progress?

[June 13, 2023, 08:29 PM] Gina: Remember that staying positive is very important.  Rock on!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a quote on a white sheet with a rainbow of light]
[June 13, 2023, 08:29 PM] Jon: Thanks, Gina! Your support's really been awesome.
[June 13, 2023, 08:29 PM] Gina: Thanks! Keep going for your dreams and don't quit!
[June 13, 2023, 08:29 PM] Jon: I won't give up, Gina! I'll keep pushing and working to make my dreams happen. Thanks for the support!

[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Gina: Hey Jon! Great hearing from you again. How have you been? BTW, I found a cool new fashion piece for my store. Can't wait to share with my customers.

Had that performance and it was awesome - so many people there complementing my dance moves. Dancing brings me joy and it was nice to be reminded why I'm passionate about it.

[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Gina: That's awesome! I'm sure you feel great knowing your students are doing so well with dance. It's amazing what it can do for people! Oh, and btw - I've been working hard on my online store and just teamed up with a local artist for some cool designs. Check 'em out!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a rack of clothes with a coat and a dress]

[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Gina: Thanks Jon! I got the idea from a fashion mag and saw there wasn't much around like it. So I worked with the artist to make it happen - it's all about being ahead of the game and giving my customers something different.
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Jon: Nice one, Gina! You never shy away from a challenge and always try something new. I'm impressed by your willingness to take risks - it's really inspiring.
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Gina: Thanks! Taking risks is scary but it's the only way to grow, right? Just part of the journey to success.
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Jon: Yeah, I totally agree - taking risks is key for success. It's made me grow, and even got me out of my secure 9-5 as a banker. Now, I'm aiming to turn my dancing passion into a business. I'm determined to make it work, I just know it! That being said, I definitely don't underestimate the difficulties - it ain't been a walk in the park, that's for sure.
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Gina: It's tough starting a biz, but don't let it get you down. You can make your studio work, I'm sure. And remember, I'm always here for you.
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Jon: Thanks, Gina. Your help means a lot. I'll keep plugging away and stay optimistic.
  [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a cartoon character with a quote about fear]
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Gina: This quote kept me positive through tough times. We all need a push sometimes, right? Even made a tattoo to remind myself about it.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a woman standing on a balcony with a blue dress]
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Jon: Love the tattoo, did you just get it?
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Gina: Thanks! Got the tattoo a few years ago, it stands for freedom - dancing without worrying what people think. A reminder to follow my passions and express myself.
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Jon: Nice reminder, Gina! It's so important to have freedom and express ourselves without worry. Dance gives me an escape to be myself.
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a woman in a tutu posing for a picture]
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Gina: Totally agree, Jon. Dancing lets us be ourselves and ain't nothing like the feeling it gives us. You're so dedicated to your studio, it's inspiring. Chase those dreams, buddy!
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Jon: Thanks, Gina! Your support means so much. I'm gonna keep chasing after those dreams. Dance is my passion, and I'm gonna keep working hard to make it a success!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a trophy with a glass globe on top]
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Gina: This is the right attitude! How have you been juggling dance and business goals?

My dance moves get me pumped to tackle my business goals, and successes there boost my drive to keep dreaming on the dance floor. It's a balancing act, but fun.
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Gina: Wow, Jon! You're amazing at juggling both your passions. Finding that happy medium is key - keep going and don't stop dreaming, buddy!
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Jon: Thanks, Gina! Your pep-talk really meant a lot. I'm not gonna give up on my dreams - my dance studio and biz ventures need the hard work I'm putting in. Love having you in my corner, thanks for always being there!
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Gina: Yeah Jon, I'm here for you! Chasing our dreams and helping each other out. Let's keep movin' forward!

[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Gina: Thanks, Jon! I'll try my best. You're gonna do great with your dance studio, just keep going and stay positive! We'll get through this!

questions_detail.question: What kind of dance piece did Gina's team perform to win first place?

memories.memory:
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Hey Jon! Good to see you. What's up? Anything new?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Hey Gina! Good to see you too. Lost my job as a banker yesterday, so I'm gonna take a shot at starting my own business.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Sorry about your job Jon, but starting your own business sounds awesome! Unfortunately, I also lost my job at Door Dash this month. What business are you thinking of?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Sorry to hear that! I'm starting a dance studio 'cause I'm passionate about dancing and it'd be great to share it with others.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: That's cool, Jon! What got you into this biz?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: I've been into dancing since I was a kid and it's been my passion and escape. I wanna start a dance studio so I can teach others the joy that dancing brings me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow Jon, same here! Dance is pretty much my go-to for stress relief. Got any fave styles?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Cool, Gina! I love all dances, but contemporary is my top pick. It's so expressive and powerful! What's your fave?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Yeah, me too! Contemporary dance is so expressive and graceful - it really speaks to me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, great idea! Let's go to a dance class, it'll be so much fun!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Yeah! Let's explore some new dance moves. We should plan a dance session soon!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah definitely! Wanna see my moves next Fri? Can't wait!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Sounds great, Jon! Next Friday works. Let's boogie!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, I'm excited too! This is gonna be great!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a man in a suit is performing a dance]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow! What did you get?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Woah, that pic's from when my dance crew took home first in a local comp last year. It was amazing up on that stage! I'm super keen to spread that intensity with other peeps. Gina, you ever been in any dance comps or shows?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: I used to compete in a few dance competitions and shows - my fav memory was when my team won first place at a regionals at age fifteen. It was an awesome feeling of accomplishment!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photography of a couple of people standing next to each other]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow! Winning first place is amazing! What dance were you doing?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Thanks! We just did a contemporary piece called "Finding Freedom." It was really emotional and powerful.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a large open porch with a fireplace and a view of the water]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, that must've been great! Check my ideal dance studio by the water.

[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Hey Jon! Good to see you. What's up? Anything new?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Hey Gina! Good to see you too. Lost my job as a banker yesterday, so I'm gonna take a shot at starting my own business.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Sorry about your job Jon, but starting your own business sounds awesome! Unfortunately, I also lost my job at Door Dash this month. What business are you thinking of?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Sorry to hear that! I'm starting a dance studio 'cause I'm passionate about dancing and it'd be great to share it with others.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: That's cool, Jon! What got you into this biz?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: I've been into dancing since I was a kid and it's been my passion and escape. I wanna start a dance studio so I can teach others the joy that dancing brings me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow Jon, same here! Dance is pretty much my go-to for stress relief. Got any fave styles?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Cool, Gina! I love all dances, but contemporary is my top pick. It's so expressive and powerful! What's your fave?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Yeah, me too! Contemporary dance is so expressive and graceful - it really speaks to me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, great idea! Let's go to a dance class, it'll be so much fun!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Yeah! Let's explore some new dance moves. We should plan a dance session soon!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah definitely! Wanna see my moves next Fri? Can't wait!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Sounds great, Jon! Next Friday works. Let's boogie!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, I'm excited too! This is gonna be great!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a man in a suit is performing a dance]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow! What did you get?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Woah, that pic's from when my dance crew took home first in a local comp last year. It was amazing up on that stage! I'm super keen to spread that intensity with other peeps. Gina, you ever been in any dance comps or shows?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: I used to compete in a few dance competitions and shows - my fav memory was when my team won first place at a regionals at age fifteen. It was an awesome feeling of accomplishment!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photography of a couple of people standing next to each other]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow! Winning first place is amazing! What dance were you doing?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Thanks! We just did a contemporary piece called "Finding Freedom." It was really emotional and powerful.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a large open porch with a fireplace and a view of the water]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, that must've been great! Check my ideal dance studio by the water.
  [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a room with a view of the ocean and a few yoga mats]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Cool setup! Man, you can't deny that view! Got time to rehearse with a biz and a new store?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Hopefully, we will find a place like this that will inspire us!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, it looks great! What dances do you practice? Got any projects planned?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Thanks! I rehearsed with a small group of dancers after work. We do all kinds of dances, from contemporary to hip-hop. We've got some cool projects in the works. Finishing up choreography to perform at a nearby festival next month. Can't wait!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a group of dancers in white dresses on a stage]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, it looks awesome! Are they yours at the festival? They're so graceful!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah, they're the ones performing at the festival! They've been practicing hard and will definitely impress with their grace and skill.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, they look great! Can't wait to see them rock the festival. Gonna be awesome!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah, awesome! Glad to be part of it.

I've been looking at different places and picturing how the space would look. I even found a place with great natural light! Oh, I've been to Paris yesterday! It was sooo cool.

Now, I'm aiming to turn my dancing passion into a business. I'm determined to make it work, I just know it! That being said, I definitely don't underestimate the difficulties - it ain't been a walk in the park, that's for sure.

  [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a cartoon character with a quote about fear]

  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a woman standing on a balcony with a blue dress]

[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Jon: Nice reminder, Gina! It's so important to have freedom and express ourselves without worry. Dance gives me an escape to be myself.
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a woman in a tutu posing for a picture]
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Gina: Totally agree, Jon. Dancing lets us be ourselves and ain't nothing like the feeling it gives us. You're so dedicated to your studio, it's inspiring. Chase those dreams, buddy!
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Jon: Thanks, Gina! Your support means so much. I'm gonna keep chasing after those dreams. Dance is my passion, and I'm gonna keep working hard to make it a success!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a trophy with a glass globe on top]
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Gina: This is the right attitude! How have you been juggling dance and business goals?
[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Jon: Thanks! Juggling both my passions can be tricky, but so rewarding. Dancing and running my biz need hard work, plus they give me energy for each other. My dance moves get me pumped to tackle my business goals, and successes there boost my drive to keep dreaming on the dance floor. It's a balancing act, but fun.

[February 08, 2023, 09:32 AM] Gina: Yeah Jon, I'm here for you! Chasing our dreams and helping each other out. Let's keep movin' forward!

[February 04, 2023, 10:43 AM] Jon: Searching for a dance studio location has been tricky, but I'm determined to find the right spot - when I do, I'm sure the rest will follow!
[February 04, 2023, 10:43 AM] Gina: Searching for the perfect dance studio's a tough job, Jon. Hang in there and you'll find it soon!

  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a woman in a gray dress doing a trick]

[February 04, 2023, 10:43 AM] Gina: No doubt, Jon you've got this. Your passion and commitment are awesome! Keep it up!
[February 04, 2023, 10:43 AM] Jon: Thanks! I'm going for my dreams!
[February 04, 2023, 10:43 AM] Gina: Absolutely Jon. I'm always here to cheer you on. Make your dreams happen - keep going and believe in yourself. You got this!

[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Jon: Gina, you won't believe it - I got mentored by this amazing business dude yesterday! It was really inspiring and now I'm even more pumped to chase my dreams. What's been up with you lately?

[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Gina: Thanks, Jon! It was a huge jump, but totally worth it. My advice: stay passionate, focused and resilient. Challenges will come, but believe in yourself and keep going. And stay open to learning and improving.

[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Gina: Yep Jon, staying resilient and focused is key for any entrepreneur. Keep going and don't give up! You got this!
[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Jon: Thanks! I won't quit, no matter what. Your encouragement really motivates me to keep going.
[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Gina: Way to go, Jon! Don't quit, remember, failures lead you closer to success. Here's a pic from when I was dancing - it was a tough road, but it was worth it!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a group of young women posing for a picture]
[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Jon: Wow, that's an awesome pic! You guys look great and passionate about dancing. Reminds me how much I love performing. Thanks for sharing!
[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Gina: Thanks! I'm glad the pic reminded you of your love for dancing. Keep going after your dreams!
[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Jon: Sure thing, Gina! Your help means a lot to me. I'm not giving up.
[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Gina: Go, Jon! I'm here for you. Keep going!
[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Jon: Knowing you've got my back really helps keep me going. I won't let you down!
[June 16, 2023, 09:38 PM] Gina: No worries, Jon! You're really inspiring with your determination and passion for dance. Keep it up!

[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Jon: Hey Gina, hope you're doing ok! Still following my passion for dance. It's been bumpy, but I'm determined to make it work. I'm still searching for a place to open my dance studio.
[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Gina: Hi Jon! So happy you're pushing forward with dancing! Inspiring 💪 I emailed some wholesalers and one replied and said yes today! I'm over the moon because now I can expand my clothing store and get closer to my customers. Check it out - here's a pic!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photography of a shopping mall with a glass entrance and a sign]

  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a room with a mirror and a wooden floor]
[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Gina: Thanks! Glad you like it. Yeah, it's a great spot. Here's a peek at the space I designed. Cozy and inviting - perfect for customers to check out all the trendy pieces.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photography of a clothing store with a lot of clothes on display]
[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Jon: Wow, it looks great! Must've taken you ages to design it. What made you pick out the furniture and decor?
[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Gina: Thanks! It took a bit of time but I wanted to make the place look like my own style and make my customers feel cozy. I chose furniture that looks great and is comfy too. The chandelier adds a nice glam feel while matching the style of the store.
[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Jon: Your store looks great - your customers will be so comfy.
[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Gina: Thanks! Making my spot comfortable and inviting for my customers is key. I want 'em to feel like they're in a cool oasis. Just creating an experience that'll make 'em wanna come back.
[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Jon: That's a great goal! Creating a special experience for customers is the key to making them feel welcome and coming back. I think you can create that space you're imagining.
[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Gina: Thanks. Your support means a lot. I'm sure with my hard work and effort, I can make a special shopping experience for my customers. It's tough but I'm up for the challenge!
[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Jon: I'm always here to support you! Go create something awesome with your store. Keep it up!
[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Gina: Thanks, Jon! I'll try my best. You're gonna do great with your dance studio, just keep going and stay positive! We'll get through this!

[February 01, 2023, 12:48 AM] Gina: Sure thing, Jon! Stay motivated and keep going. Hard work pays off eventually. We can do this!

[June 13, 2023, 08:29 PM] Jon: Hey Gina, thanks for being there for me and believing in me. It means a lot.

[June 13, 2023, 08:29 PM] Jon: Thanks, Gina! It's been so inspiring to work with our young dancers, seeing their passion and commitment. Opening the dance studio's been a great experience - I want it to be a place of support and encouragement for all our dancers. Will you show me this presentation?

questions_detail.question: What is Jon's attitude towards being part of the dance festival?

memories.memory:
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Hey Jon! Good to see you. What's up? Anything new?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Hey Gina! Good to see you too. Lost my job as a banker yesterday, so I'm gonna take a shot at starting my own business.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Sorry about your job Jon, but starting your own business sounds awesome! Unfortunately, I also lost my job at Door Dash this month. What business are you thinking of?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Sorry to hear that! I'm starting a dance studio 'cause I'm passionate about dancing and it'd be great to share it with others.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: That's cool, Jon! What got you into this biz?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: I've been into dancing since I was a kid and it's been my passion and escape. I wanna start a dance studio so I can teach others the joy that dancing brings me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow Jon, same here! Dance is pretty much my go-to for stress relief. Got any fave styles?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Cool, Gina! I love all dances, but contemporary is my top pick. It's so expressive and powerful! What's your fave?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Yeah, me too! Contemporary dance is so expressive and graceful - it really speaks to me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, great idea! Let's go to a dance class, it'll be so much fun!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Yeah! Let's explore some new dance moves. We should plan a dance session soon!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah definitely! Wanna see my moves next Fri? Can't wait!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Sounds great, Jon! Next Friday works. Let's boogie!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, I'm excited too! This is gonna be great!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a man in a suit is performing a dance]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow! What did you get?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Woah, that pic's from when my dance crew took home first in a local comp last year. It was amazing up on that stage! I'm super keen to spread that intensity with other peeps. Gina, you ever been in any dance comps or shows?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: I used to compete in a few dance competitions and shows - my fav memory was when my team won first place at a regionals at age fifteen. It was an awesome feeling of accomplishment!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photography of a couple of people standing next to each other]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow! Winning first place is amazing! What dance were you doing?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Thanks! We just did a contemporary piece called "Finding Freedom." It was really emotional and powerful.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a large open porch with a fireplace and a view of the water]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, that must've been great! Check my ideal dance studio by the water.
  [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a room with a view of the ocean and a few yoga mats]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Cool setup! Man, you can't deny that view! Got time to rehearse with a biz and a new store?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Hopefully, we will find a place like this that will inspire us!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, it looks great! What dances do you practice? Got any projects planned?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Thanks! I rehearsed with a small group of dancers after work. We do all kinds of dances, from contemporary to hip-hop. We've got some cool projects in the works. Finishing up choreography to perform at a nearby festival next month. Can't wait!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a group of dancers in white dresses on a stage]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, it looks awesome! Are they yours at the festival? They're so graceful!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah, they're the ones performing at the festival! They've been practicing hard and will definitely impress with their grace and skill.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, they look great! Can't wait to see them rock the festival. Gonna be awesome!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah, awesome! Glad to be part of it.

[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Hey Gina! I'm turning my loves of dance into a business. I'm sunk tons of time into the studio lately, and look at my students - they're already killing it. I'm even learning with them!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a group of dancers on a stage with a red background]
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Hey Jon! Wow, way to take your passion and make it into a biz! The dance studio looks awesome.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a display of a dress and a flamingo]
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Thanks, Gina! I'm determined to make this studio work. Losing my job was tough but it gave me the push I needed to do what I love.
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Woah, Jon! Tough times can be a gateway to awesome things. Glad you worked up the courage to go after your dreams!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a red dress with gold accents on a mannequin]
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Yeah, Gina! It's been tough, but I'm living my true self. Dancing makes me so happy, and now I get to share that with other people. Seeing my students get better at it brings me such joy.
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a woman doing a pole dance in a dance studio]
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Wow Jon, you look so happy when you dance! Show the world your true self and keep dancing!
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Thanks a bunch, Gina! You seriously rock. Dancing for me is like a way to express myself and find my happy place. I used to be scared to death of what people would think, but I learnt that my own happiness is the most important thing. It's been tough but also the best thing ever!
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Yeah, I do remember those dance classes! I used to love spending time in the studio. That photo looks awesome, brings back lots of memories. It's nice to know, dance is still your happy place.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a group of young women in ballet attire]
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Nice, Gina! I'm happy that dance has such a special meaning to both of us. It's a really cool way to express ourselves. I loved taking lessons with my friends when I was younger. Those memories are so precious. So glad I can still enjoy it with my own studio. Thanks for always being there for me.
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Hey Jon! Got your back - dance is awesome for expressing yourself and finding happiness. Here's one of my trophies from a dance contest, nice reminder of the hard work, dedication and joy it brings.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a trophy with a glass globe on top]
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Wow! It looks awesome! Thanks for the support, it really means a lot.
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: No prob, Jon! You earned all the kudos for your hard work. Keep it up!
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Jon: Thanks! Gonna keep pushing and working hard. Won't let anything hold me back!
[April 09, 2023, 10:33 AM] Gina: Way to go, Jon! Keep it up, you're almost there!

[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Hi! Since we last spoke I am still working on the dance studio and things are looking up!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a woman in a short skirt with her hands on her hips]
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: Hi! You're so inspiring taking it on and opening your own studio!
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Thanks! Losing my job gave me the push to finally start my dream business: my own dance studio! Now I'm stepping into the unknown and hoping for the best.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: It must be scary stepping into the unknown but I know you can do it, Jon. With your determination and drive, your dance studio will be a huge success. Keep that positive outlook and keep going!
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Thanks! It's a bit scary, but I just think about my love for dance and how it makes me feel. It's been my stress-buster since childhood!
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: Gotcha, Jon! Dance is my stress fix too. As soon as I start, all my worries vanish. It's amazing what we can do for our own mental health with something we enjoy.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Yeah, Gina! Dancing helps me de-stress. It's where I'm most alive. It's a must-have in my life.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: I get it, Jon. Dance is just me -- I can't picture life without it. It's like air.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Yep! Dancing is like second nature to me. I'm living my dream by having my own dance studio and teaching others.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: You're living the dream and inspiring others too! Your studio will totally change things for lots of folks.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: I hope so, Gina. I want to create a place for people to dance and express themselves - it's been a dream of mine.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: That's a great dream, Jon! Giving people a place to express themselves with dance is really important. Your studio is gonna make a huge difference. Can't wait to see it happen!
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Thanks! Your help means a lot. Keep you posted on the dance studio progress.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: Thanks! Really appreciate you keeping me in the loop on this cool project. Can't wait to hear more and watch it come to life! Oh, btw, I had an interview for a design internship yesterday! It was so cool.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Wow, Gina, I'm stoked about this! Taking a risk is scary, but I'm sure following my dreams will pay off in the end. How did the interview go?
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: It was great!
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Glad to hear it. Been practicing dance routines lately, it keeps my mind focused and motivated.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: Wow! That's great. Dancing is awesome for staying focused. Wanna show me a routine sometime?
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Sure, Gina! Wanna see one of my routines? Lemme know when you got time and I'll send you a vid.
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: Yeah, Jon, I'll watch your routine! So proud of you!
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Jon: Thanks a lot! Your help really means a lot. I'll get the video to you soon!
[May 11, 2023, 03:14 PM] Gina: No prob! Always here to help. Can't wait to see the vid!

[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Jon: Hey Gina! We haven't talked in a few days. Been rehearsing hard and working on business plans. It's been stressful, but dancing has kept me going.
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Gina: Hey Jon! Remember, just do it! You should get to the point where anyone else would quit and you're not going to stop there. No, what are you waiting for? Do it! Just do it!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a group of dancers on a stage with their arms in the air]
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Jon: Ha, ha! Thanks, Gina. Sounds familiar, who do those words belong to?
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Gina: It's Shia Labeouf!
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Jon: Ahhahha, really!? Yea, that definitely him.
[July 23, 2023, 06:46 PM] Gina: Hah, yeah!) But really having a creative space for dancers is so important. Last Friday at dance class with a group of friends I felt it. Your studio will be a go-to spot for self-expression. Keep up the good work and don't forget your passion for dance.

[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Hey Jon! Good to see you. What's up? Anything new?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Hey Gina! Good to see you too. Lost my job as a banker yesterday, so I'm gonna take a shot at starting my own business.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Sorry about your job Jon, but starting your own business sounds awesome! Unfortunately, I also lost my job at Door Dash this month. What business are you thinking of?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Sorry to hear that! I'm starting a dance studio 'cause I'm passionate about dancing and it'd be great to share it with others.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: That's cool, Jon! What got you into this biz?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: I've been into dancing since I was a kid and it's been my passion and escape. I wanna start a dance studio so I can teach others the joy that dancing brings me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow Jon, same here! Dance is pretty much my go-to for stress relief. Got any fave styles?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Cool, Gina! I love all dances, but contemporary is my top pick. It's so expressive and powerful! What's your fave?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Yeah, me too! Contemporary dance is so expressive and graceful - it really speaks to me.
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, great idea! Let's go to a dance class, it'll be so much fun!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Yeah! Let's explore some new dance moves. We should plan a dance session soon!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Yeah definitely! Wanna see my moves next Fri? Can't wait!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Sounds great, Jon! Next Friday works. Let's boogie!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, I'm excited too! This is gonna be great!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a man in a suit is performing a dance]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow! What did you get?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Woah, that pic's from when my dance crew took home first in a local comp last year. It was amazing up on that stage! I'm super keen to spread that intensity with other peeps. Gina, you ever been in any dance comps or shows?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: I used to compete in a few dance competitions and shows - my fav memory was when my team won first place at a regionals at age fifteen. It was an awesome feeling of accomplishment!
  [Image shared by Gina: a photography of a couple of people standing next to each other]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow! Winning first place is amazing! What dance were you doing?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Thanks! We just did a contemporary piece called "Finding Freedom." It was really emotional and powerful.
  [Image shared by Gina: a photo of a large open porch with a fireplace and a view of the water]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Wow, that must've been great! Check my ideal dance studio by the water.
  [Image shared by Jon: a photography of a room with a view of the ocean and a few yoga mats]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Cool setup! Man, you can't deny that view! Got time to rehearse with a biz and a new store?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Hopefully, we will find a place like this that will inspire us!
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, it looks great! What dances do you practice? Got any projects planned?
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Jon: Thanks! I rehearsed with a small group of dancers after work. We do all kinds of dances, from contemporary to hip-hop. We've got some cool projects in the works. Finishing up choreography to perform at a nearby festival next month. Can't wait!
  [Image shared by Jon: a photo of a group of dancers in white dresses on a stage]
[January 20, 2023, 04:04 PM] Gina: Wow, it looks awesome! Are they yours at the festival? They're so graceful!
